Bash(python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\(r'D:/桌面/proteomics_output/2026.3.12 pr-ptx3 60h 蛋白质谱3vs3.csv'\)
df.columns = df.columns.str.strip\(\)
print\('Sig values:', df['Sig'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)\)
for col in ['mean c','mean ptx3','log2FC','P.value']:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric\(df[col], errors='coerce'\)
up = df[df['Sig']=='up']
down = df[df['Sig']=='down']
print\('Up count:', len\(up\), 'Down count:', len\(down\)\)
print\('Up with mean_c < 0.01:', len\(up[up['mean c'] < 0.01]\)\)
print\('Up with |log2FC| < 1:', len\(up[up['log2FC'].abs\(\) < 1]\)\)
print\('Down with |log2FC| < 1:', len\(down[down['log2FC'].abs\(\) < 1]\)\)
print\(\)
print\('Up log2FC min/max:', up['log2FC'].min\(\), up['log2FC'].max\(\)\)
print\('Down log2FC min/max:', down['log2FC'].min\(\), down['log2FC'].max\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/桌面/proteomics_output" && python << 'PYEOF'
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from statsmodels.stats.multitest import multipletests

df = pd.read_csv\('D:/桌面/proteomics_output/2026.3.12 pr-ptx3 60h 蛋白质谱3vs3.csv'\)
df.columns = df.columns.str.strip\(\)
for c in ['CTRL-1','CTRL-2','CTRL-3','PTX3-1','PTX3-2','PTX3-3','mean c','mean ptx3','log2FC','P.value']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric\(df[c], errors='coerce'\)

ctrl = ['CTRL-1','CTRL-2','CTRL-3']
ptx3 = ['PTX3-1','PTX3-2','PTX3-3']

print\(f"Total: {len\(df\)}"\)
print\(f"Sig counts: {df['Sig'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)}"\)

up = df[df['Sig']=='up']
down = df[df['Sig']=='down']
print\(f"Up: {len\(up\)}, Down: {len\(down\)}"\)
print\(f"Up |log2FC|<1: {\(up['log2FC'].abs\(\)<1\).sum\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Up |log2FC|>=8: {\(up['log2FC'].abs\(\)>=8\).sum\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Down |log2FC|>=8: {\(down['log2FC'].abs\(\)>=8\).sum\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Min non-zero mean c: {df['mean c'][df['mean c']>0].min\(\):.6f}"\)
print\(f"Min non-zero mean ptx3: {df['mean ptx3'][df['mean ptx3']>0].min\(\):.6f}"\)

# BH FDR
df_valid = df.dropna\(subset=['P.value']\).copy\(\)
_, fdr, _, _ = multipletests\(df_valid['P.value'], method='fdr_bh'\)
df_valid['FDR'] = fdr

# On/off detection
ctrl_max = df_valid[ctrl].max\(axis=1\)
ptx3_max = df_valid[ptx3].max\(axis=1\)
df_valid['is_onoff'] = \(ctrl_max < 0.01\) | \(ptx3_max < 0.01\)

# Stringent
s = df_valid[\(df_valid['FDR'] < 0.05\) & \(df_valid['log2FC'].abs\(\) >= 1.0\) & \(~df_valid['is_onoff']\)]
print\(f"\\nStringent \(FDR<0.05, |log2FC|>=1, no on/off\): {len\(s\)} \(up={len\(s[s.log2FC>0]\)}, down={len\(s[s.log2FC<0]\)}\)"\)

# Exploratory
e = df_valid[\(df_valid['P.value'] < 0.01\) & \(df_valid['log2FC'].abs\(\) >= 1.0\) & \(~df_valid['is_onoff']\)]
print\(f"Exploratory \(p<0.01, |log2FC|>=1, no on/off\): {len\(e\)} \(up={len\(e[e.log2FC>0]\)}, down={len\(e[e.log2FC<0]\)}\)"\)

# On/off
oo = df_valid[df_valid['is_onoff'] & \(df_valid['P.value'] < 0.05\)]
print\(f"On/off \(p<0.05\): {len\(oo\)} \(up={len\(oo[oo.log2FC>0]\)}, down={len\(oo[oo.log2FC<0]\)}\)"\)

# How many FDR<0.05 total \(any FC\)?
print\(f"\\nFDR<0.05 total: {\(df_valid['FDR']<0.05\).sum\(\)}"\)
print\(f"FDR<0.1 total: {\(df_valid['FDR']<0.1\).sum\(\)}"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(cd "D:/桌面/proteomics_output" && python << 'PYEOF'
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from statsmodels.stats.multitest import multipletests

df = pd.read_csv\('D:/桌面/proteomics_output/2026.3.12 pr-ptx3 60h 蛋白质谱3vs3.csv'\)
df.columns = df.columns.str.strip\(\)
for c in ['CTRL-1','CTRL-2','CTRL-3','PTX3-1','PTX3-2','PTX3-3','mean c','mean ptx3','log2FC','P.value']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric\(df[c], errors='coerce'\)

ctrl = ['CTRL-1','CTRL-2','CTRL-3']
ptx3 = ['PTX3-1','PTX3-2','PTX3-3']

df_valid = df.dropna\(subset=['P.value']\).copy\(\)
_, fdr, _, _ = multipletests\(df_valid['P.value'], method='fdr_bh'\)
df_valid['FDR'] = fdr

ctrl_max = df_valid[ctrl].max\(axis=1\)
ptx3_max = df_valid[ptx3].max\(axis=1\)
df_valid['is_onoff'] = \(ctrl_max < 0.01\) | \(ptx3_max < 0.01\)

# FDR < 0.1 with |log2FC| >= 1.0 \(no on/off\)
s1 = df_valid[\(df_valid['FDR'] < 0.1\) & \(df_valid['log2FC'].abs\(\) >= 1.0\) & \(~df_valid['is_onoff']\)]
print\(f"FDR<0.1, |log2FC|>=1, no on/off: {len\(s1\)} \(up={len\(s1[s1.log2FC>0]\)}, down={len\(s1[s1.log2FC<0]\)}\)"\)

# The 4 FDR<0.05 proteins
fdr05 = df_valid[df_valid['FDR'] < 0.05]
print\(f"\\nFDR<0.05 proteins:"\)
for _, r in fdr05.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f"  {r['Gene']}: log2FC={r['log2FC']:.2f}, P={r['P.value']:.6f}, FDR={r['FDR']:.4f}, onoff={r['is_onoff']}"\)

# Exploratory p<0.05 + |log2FC|>=1 \(no on/off\)
e2 = df_valid[\(df_valid['P.value'] < 0.05\) & \(df_valid['log2FC'].abs\(\) >= 1.0\) & \(~df_valid['is_onoff']\)]
print\(f"\\np<0.05, |log2FC|>=1, no on/off: {len\(e2\)} \(up={len\(e2[e2.log2FC>0]\)}, down={len\(e2[e2.log2FC<0]\)}\)"\)
PYEOF)

import urllib.request, json

# Check available WikiPathways library name
url = 'https://maayanlab.cloud/Enrichr/datasetStatistics'
result = json.loads\(urllib.request.urlopen\(url, timeout=15\).read\(\)\)
libs = [s['libraryName'] for s in result['statistics']]
wiki = [l for l in libs if 'wiki' in l.lower\(\)]
print\("WikiPathways libs:", wiki\)
PYEOF)
